medical_limitations: The system is not a medical diagnostic tool.
Predictions should not replace professional medical advice.
Clinical confirmation is required for diagnosis.
technical_limitations: Performance depends on audio quality and recording conditions.
Background noise may affect prediction accuracy.
Variations in age, gender, and environment may influence cough acoustics.
Limited training data may reduce generalization across populations.
model_limitations: May produce false positives or false negatives.
Cannot detect conditions outside trained disease categories.
Model confidence does not guarantee medical accuracy.
operational_limitations: Real-world deployment may introduce unseen noise patterns.
ethical_notice: The system provides supportive evidence for early screening and must be used responsibly.
